title: Can Science Survive in the Modern Age? A Revisit after Twenty Years
summary: According to Carly Haskins (I), "modern archaeological research leaves little room for doubt that the basic technological revolutions of mankind antedated the scientific revolution by many thousands of years."
body: According to Carly Haskins ( I ), "modern archaeological research leaves little room for doubt that the basic technological revolutions of mankind antedated the scientific revolution by many thousands of years."
